title: Ostium Protocol Bug Bounty Launch
summary: Ostium Protocol, a decentralized exchange for RWAs on Arbitrum, launches a bug bounty program with rewards up to $100,000 for critical vulnerabilities.

title: dRPC Launches NodeHaus for Foundations
summary: dRPC introduces NodeHaus, an infrastructure platform providing real-time RPC monitoring and control for L1 and L2 foundations to optimize ecosystem growth.

title: FOIL Protocol Live on Immunefi
summary: FOIL Protocol joins Immunefi with a $10,000 maximum bounty. The program focuses on smart contract security for their average price fixing mechanism.

title: L2 Bridge Vulnerability Patched Post-Analysis
summary: Detailed post-mortem of a recently patched vulnerability in a major L2 bridge. The flaw involved incorrect state validation during cross-chain withdrawals.

title: Movement Labs Attackathon Concludes
summary: The Movement Labs Attackathon on Immunefi has concluded with a $400,000 reward pool, focusing on Move-based blockchain security and execution environments.
